interface.shortDescription: Connects Codex to MemForge hooks and MCP memory tools.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to a local or cloud MemForge instance. Hooks receive compact memory context and submit lifecycle receipts, while bundled MCP tools support explicit memory search facets, memory detail lookup, source artifact retrieval, and agent-session document submission.
defaultPrompt: Use MemForge memory before editing this repo.
Check recent memory changes for this project.
Submit a session summary to MemForge.
